paneContent:
● Signal completion (shell)
  │ npx storyboard agent signal --status done --message "Research delivered: 4 principles
  │ for sustainable design systems (token architecture, governance, versioning, adoption
  │ metrics)"
  └ 2 lines...

● Research complete and posted to the canvas. Here's what I sent to gold-egret:

  ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  4 Key Principles for Sustainable Design Systems

  1. Token Architecture as the Foundation — 3-tier hierarchy (Primitive → Semantic →
  Component). Rebrands touch only primitives; component APIs stay stable.

  2. Governance Without Gatekeeping — Contribution ladder (propose → RFC → ratify) with
  domain stewards outside the core team to prevent bottlenecks.

  3. Versioning & the Breaking Change Contract — Semantic versioning with explicit
  policies + automated codemods turns upgrades from projects into routine maintenance.

  4. Adoption Metrics Over Usage Metrics — Track adoption rate and drift rate, not raw
  usage counts. Drift = the system isn't meeting real needs; fix before building new
  components.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus [⎇ 0.5.0--messaging-bus*%]
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
❯
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 / commands · ? help                                    terminal-agent · Claude Opus 4.6
